name: Morning Reflections Devotional Journal
description: Guided devotional journal featuring 52 weekly reflections inspired by the Morning Reflections with Rebecca radio program on WGSP 1490 AM. Hardcover, 200 pages.

name: Morning Reflections with Rebecca Tote Bag
description: Canvas tote bag with Morning Reflections with Rebecca logo and the phrase "Joy as Discipline" - great for church, farmers market, or everyday carry.

name: Season of Rest - CD Collection
description: Curated 2-CD set of inspirational music featured on Morning Reflections with Rebecca: worship, folk Americana, and classic gospel. Includes liner notes by Rebecca Price.

name: "Anchored" Inspirational Mug
description: 15 oz ceramic mug screen-printed with the Morning Reflections anchor logo and the verse Isaiah 40:31. Dishwasher safe.

name: Henri Nouwen - The Return of the Prodigal Son (Signed Bookplate)
description: Physical copy of Henri Nouwen's The Return of the Prodigal Son bundled with a signed bookplate from Rebecca Price. Featured on a January 2026 Morning Reflections book segment.

name: Morning Reflections Episode Archive - Digital Download
description: Digital download of the 2025 Morning Reflections archive - 48 episodes including holiday specials, guest interviews, and seasonal meditations from WGSP 1490 AM.

name: Zinnias and Grace - Guided Garden Meditation Audio
description: A 22-minute guided meditation recorded by Rebecca Price, drawing on imagery from her Cooper-Young garden - zinnias, lavender, birdsong. Perfect for morning quiet time.

name: Grace Community Church Health Fair Wellness Kit
description: Wellness kit assembled for the annual Grace Community Church health fair: fabric resistance band, herbal tea sampler, devotional card set, and community resource guide. Coordinated by Rebecca Price and Deacon Charles Mosley.

name: Morning Reflections Wall Calendar 2026
description: 12-month wall calendar featuring monthly scripture passages, reflection prompts, and photography from Memphis. Designed with Canva by Rebecca Price.

name: Brenda Brown - Daring Greatly (Show Pick)
description: Brené Brown's Daring Greatly - selected as a Morning Reflections book club pick for March 2026. Comes with a printed discussion guide written by Rebecca Price.

name: "Be Still" Linen Bookmark Set (3-Pack)
description: Set of 3 hand-stamped linen bookmarks with scripture passages hand-selected by Rebecca Price. Packaged in a kraft envelope with a Morning Reflections card.

name: Morning Reflections Hoodie - Navy
description: Unisex pullover hoodie in navy with the Morning Reflections with Rebecca logo embroidered on the chest. 50% cotton / 50% polyester. Sizes S-3XL.

name: Covenant Insurance Group Sponsored Devotional Pack
description: Complimentary devotional pack sponsored by Covenant Insurance Group - distributed at Grace Community Church events and the annual health fair. Not for individual sale.

name: "Roots and Wings" Women of Faith Gift Bundle
description: Women of faith gift bundle honoring the mothers and mentors who shaped us: Morning Reflections devotional journal, Anchored mug, and a 3-pack of linen bookmarks, gift-wrapped with a personalized card from Rebecca. Ships within 3 business days.

name: Howard Thurman - Jesus and the Disinherited (Show Pick)
description: Howard Thurman's Jesus and the Disinherited - featured on Morning Reflections during the January 2026 Civil Rights reflection series. Includes a printed reading guide by Rebecca Price.

name: Winter Stillness - Guided Reflection Audio Bundle
description: Digital audio bundle of four 15-20 minute guided reflections recorded by Rebecca Price for the winter season: morning, midday, evening, and sabbath rest tracks.
